app.name: AI Work OS
app.description: AI Work Operating System with workflow orchestration, task tracking, and results visualization powered by a remote MCP server.

widgets.title: Task Dashboard
widgets.description: Displays workflow tasks, owners, and live status.

widgets.title: Workflow Viewer
widgets.description: Shows workflow stages, dependencies, and execution progress.

widgets.title: Results Viewer
widgets.description: Renders structured task outputs, campaign assets, and final summaries.

tools.name: create_workflow
tools.description: Create a new workflow in the AI Work Operating System.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create and assign a structured task within a workflow.

tools.name: run_research
tools.description: Run research tasks using the research agent.

tools.name: generate_marketing_plan
tools.description: Generate a structured marketing campaign plan.

tools.name: generate_social_media_posts
tools.description: Generate social media posts for a campaign.

tools.name: generate_landing_page
tools.description: Generate a landing page specification and content.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed and attach structured results.
